description: You are a school facility manager at an OLPC-equipped rural school planning summer renovations. Using the room dimensions provided in /home/ga/Documents/room_dimensions.csv, create and execute a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/renovation_calc.py to calculate renovation requirements. For each of the 36 rooms, calculate the Floor Area (Length × Width) and Wall Area (2 × (Length × Height) + 2 × (Width × Height)). The script must determine the total sum of Floor Area and Wall Area across all rooms, and calculate 'Paint Buckets Needed' by dividing the Total Wall Area by 100 and rounding up to the nearest whole integer. Generate a text report at /home/ga/Documents/renovation_report.txt containing the individual room areas and the final totals using the exact labels: 'Total Floor Area:', 'Total Wall Area:', and 'Paint Buckets Needed:'.
